name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Bonemeld
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
-2% to all Resistances per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
6% increased Defences per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
Minions gain added Resistances equal to 44% of your Resistances
flavourText: Hills of stark and jagged white it walks,
The Fiend has naught but Empty Eyes,
though sees you, it does, indeed.

name: Dusk Knuckle
implicitMods: Minions have +15% to all Elemental Resistances
explicitMods: Minions have 29% increased Attack and Cast Speed

name: The Dark Monarch
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

Maximum number of Raised Spectres is Doubled
Cannot have Minions other than Raised Spectres
flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 54% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.

flavourText: "This was the first step in some grand design,
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 100% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell will track how much mana you spend on it, granting a buff when the total mana spent reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, mines or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods:
Gain Arcane Surge after Spending a total of 15 Mana on

flavourText: a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

properties.name: Attack, Minion, Duration, Movement, Travel, Prismatic, Bow

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires an arrow at the target destination. When the arrow lands, you are teleported to it and a clone is summoned at your old location. The clone is a minion that uses your bow and quiver to fire random elemental arrows which convert all physical damage to the chosen element and deal no damage of other damage types.
explicitMods: Maximum of 3 Clones that fire Elemental Arrows
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.
